# setUp()

**Type Method**

Provides an opportunity to customize initial state before a test case begins.

## Declaration

```swift
class func setUp()
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestCase/setUp()] class method is called exactly once for a test case, before its first test method is called. Override this method to customize the initial state for all tests in the test case.

## Related Documentation

- **setUp()**: Provides an opportunity to reset state before calling each test method in a test case.

## Customizing Test Setup and Teardown

- **Set Up and Tear Down State in Your Tests**: Prepare initial state before tests run, and clean up resources after tests complete.
- **addTeardownBlock(_:)**: Registers a block of teardown code to run after the current test method ends.
- **addTeardownBlock(_:)**: Registers a block of teardown code to run after the current test method ends.
- **tearDown()**: Provides an opportunity to perform cleanup after a test case ends.
